message:
feat(core): add fibonacci_heap.rs — optimal amortized priority queue with decrease-key (ft-283h4.42)

Arena-allocated Fibonacci heap with O(1) amortized insert/merge/decrease-key
and O(log n) amortized extract-min. Includes cascading cuts, consolidation,
and serde support. 20 inline + 13 property-based tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
